channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Patrick Mahomes says he lets Taylor Swift bake with his daughter amid potential Trump vs. Harris divide
item.description: Patrick Mahomes said that his three-year-old daughter Sterling Sky has baked with Taylor Swift since the pop artist began dating his teammate Travis Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Signings of the times: Banished letters of intent, shrunk transfer window equals more college chaos
item.description: The time-honored tradition of high school athletes proudly sitting behind a table and signing a national letter of intent is a thing of the past.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lions sign DT Alim McNeill to $97 million, 4-year deal in franchise's latest investment
item.description: ALLEN PARK, Mich. (AP) — The Detroit Lions have decided to make defensive tackle Alim McNeill their latest investment, retaining a key player with a long-term deal. “Fired up for Mac, he earned that,” Lions coach Dan Campbell said Wednesday. “He's a pivotal piece for us.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TNT and its sports platforms to show new Unrivaled women's 3-on-3 basketball league games
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The new Unrivaled women's basketball 3-on-3 league will have its games broadcast on TNT and its sports platforms. The league announced a multi-year partnership with the network to show more than 45 games from the inaugural season that begins in January.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Travis Kelce's ex says mom was upset over comments on Angel Reese's podcast
item.description: Kayla Nicole, the ex-girlfriend of Kansas City Chiefs star Travis Kelce, said her mom was upset with some of the comments she made on Angel Reese's podcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How Jose Iglesias’ ‘OMG’ became the perfect anthem for the underdog Mets
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It's a pop hit like many others: An ascending chorus, an addictive hook, a warm rhythm. But “OMG,” performed by New York Mets infielder Jose Iglesias, has become the perfect anthem for the team's unlikely playoff run.
item.dc:creator: MARIA SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL commish reacts to possibility of Taylor Swift owning piece of team
item.description: Taylor Swift an NFL team owner? Commissioner Roger Goodell was asked whether anyone approached the pop star about her investing in a team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nuggets' Michael Malone rips 'soft' NBA as he questions team's conditioning in preseason
item.description: Denver Nuggets head coach Michael Malone fired shots at the "soft" NBA as he questioned his team's conditioning in a preseason loss on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thomas Tuchel hired as England head coach ahead of 2026 World Cup and targets 'second star'
item.description: Thomas Tuchel has been hired as England coach and will take on the challenge of ending the national team’s decades-long wait for a trophy.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Montrose volleyball picks up huge league win over Fruita
item.description: It took all five sets to decide a battle between two of the Southwestern League's best on the volleyball court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: South Carolina ranked No. 1 in women's AP Top 25 preseason poll with UConn, USC, Texas and UCLA next
item.description: South Carolina is starting the season where it finished off last year — ranked No. 1 in the AP Top 25 women's college basketball poll. The Gamecocks received 27 of the 30 first-place votes in the preseason rankings from a national media panel Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nevada says volleyball match will go on despite players' forfeiture
item.description: The Nevada women's volleyball team players announced they would forfeit the game against San Jose State.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Cam Rising out for the season with lower leg injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising's return to the field lasted all of one game. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham announced on Monday that Rising is out for the season after suffering a lower leg injury on the first series in Friday's 27-19 loss at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey hands Utah its first loss, 3-0
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring an NHL-leading 16 goals through the first three games of the season, the Utah Hockey Club had a devil of a time scoring at New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nevada could be latest to forfeit SJSU volleyball match amidst transgender lawsuit
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- The University of Nevada, Reno (UNR) could be the latest team to forfeit a women's volleyball match against San Jose State University.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The New York Mets weren't sure what they were going to get with the Los Angeles Dodgers sending out a parade of relievers in a bullpen game. They found out right away.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Clayton Kershaw planning to pitch again next season
item.description: Clayton Kershaw says he plans to return to the Los Angeles Dodgers for his 18th season next year. The three-time NL Cy Young Award winner isn’t pitching in the current playoffs because of a bone spur in his left big toe that sidelined him for the final month of the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Snag last-minute Yankees ALCS tickets for under $100
item.description: THE BRONX, N.Y. (PIX11) --- Yankees fans can snag some last-minute tickets to Monday night's playoff game for cheaper than a regular season game. The least expensive seats for Game 1 of the ALCS at Yankee Stadium were going for around $102 on StubHub, as of Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Mira Wassef, PIX 11

item.title: Jerry West becomes first three-time inductee as Carter and Billups enter basketball's Hall of Fame
item.description: SPRINGFIELD, Mass. (AP) — The stage was filled with Laker greats when Jerry West made history Sunday night by becoming the first three-time inductee to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets' Kodai Senga struggles with control, knocked out in 2nd inning by Dodgers in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Kodai Senga knew something was off just before he took the mound in the National League Championship Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Doubs catches 2 TD passes in his return from a suspension to help Packers rout Cardinals 34-13
item.description: Romeo Doubs wanted to make amends after serving a one-game suspension for what the Green Bay Packers described as conduct detrimental to the team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackson outduels Daniels and Henry runs for two TDs as Ravens beat Commanders 30-23
item.description: Lamar Jackson threw nine passes to Zay Flowers in the first half and never went to him again. Mark Andrews rebounded from a ball bouncing off his hands for an interception to catch his first touchdown pass of the season. And Derrick Henry was Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears dominate Jaguars in London, 35-16, to extend winning streak to 3 games going into bye week
item.description: The Bears capped off their London trip in style Sunday, routing the Jacksonville Jaguars, 35-16, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to extend their winning streak to three games and improve to 4-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Keller scores game-winner in OT as Utah HC stays unbeaten
item.description: NEW YORK (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club took a big bite out of the Big Apple this week. After an overtime win over the New York Islanders on Thursday, Utah did the same thing to the Rangers at Madison Square Garden on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Vasily Espindola and the Redland Chargers take on the Fruita Cowboys
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In a dramatic 10U football playoff game, the Redland Chargers overcame a 13-point deficit in the second quarter, despite losing their starting quarterback to injury.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 on Wednesday night to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
